name: International Constructions Limited
summary: International Constructions Limited engages in the job contract works and financing activities. The company is involved in the water management, water infrastructure development, and other civil infrastructure activities. It also invests in securities and other avenues. The company was formerly known as Subhash Capital City Ltd and changed its name to International Constructions Limited in 1998. The company was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Bengaluru, India.
